Enum Class BattleStage

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Enum<BattleStage>
logic.BattleStage
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Comparable<BattleStage>, Constable
public enum BattleStage extends Enum<BattleStage>
Represents the different stages of the battle state machine.

The BattleEngine transitions between these stages to control the flow of a turn-based battle. Each stage represents a specific phase of interaction between the player, heroes, monsters, and the game system.

Typical battle flow: 

 START_BATTLE
 → HERO_CHOOSE_SKILL
 → HERO_CHOOSE_TARGET / HERO_CHOOSE_ALLY (if needed)
 → HERO_RESOLVE_ACTION
 → MONSTER_TURN
 → CHECK_END
 → HERO_CHOOSE_SKILL (next round)
 → WIN_TURN or LOSE_TURN

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested classes/interfaces inherited from class java.lang.Enum

    Enum.EnumDesc<E extends Enum<E>>

  • Enum Constant Summary

    Enum Constants
    Enum Constant
    Description
    CHECK_END
    Intermediate stage where the engine checks victory or defeat conditions.
    HERO_CHOOSE_ALLY
    Player selects an ally hero as the target of a skill (for example healing or buffs).
    HERO_CHOOSE_SKILL
    Player chooses which skill the active hero will use.
    HERO_CHOOSE_TARGET
    Player selects a monster target for a single-target skill or attack.
    HERO_RESOLVE_ACTION
    The engine resolves the chosen hero action and applies its effects.
    LOSE_TURN
    Stage indicating that all heroes are defeated and the player loses the battle.
    MONSTER_TURN
    Monsters perform their attacks after all heroes finish their actions for the round.
    START_BATTLE
    Initial stage when the battle begins and the system prepares the first turn.
    WIN_TURN
    Stage indicating that all monsters are defeated and the player wins the battle.

  • Enum Constant Details

    • START_BATTLE

      public static final BattleStage START_BATTLE
      Initial stage when the battle begins and the system prepares the first turn.

    • HERO_CHOOSE_SKILL

      public static final BattleStage HERO_CHOOSE_SKILL
      Player chooses which skill the active hero will use.

    • HERO_CHOOSE_TARGET

      public static final BattleStage HERO_CHOOSE_TARGET
      Player selects a monster target for a single-target skill or attack.

    • HERO_CHOOSE_ALLY

      public static final BattleStage HERO_CHOOSE_ALLY
      Player selects an ally hero as the target of a skill (for example healing or buffs).

    • HERO_RESOLVE_ACTION

      public static final BattleStage HERO_RESOLVE_ACTION
      The engine resolves the chosen hero action and applies its effects.

    • MONSTER_TURN

      public static final BattleStage MONSTER_TURN
      Monsters perform their attacks after all heroes finish their actions for the round.

    • CHECK_END

      public static final BattleStage CHECK_END
      Intermediate stage where the engine checks victory or defeat conditions.

    • WIN_TURN

      public static final BattleStage WIN_TURN
      Stage indicating that all monsters are defeated and the player wins the battle.

    • LOSE_TURN

      public static final BattleStage LOSE_TURN
      Stage indicating that all heroes are defeated and the player loses the battle.

    • values

    • valueOf

      public static BattleStage valueOf(String name)
      Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name. The string must match exactly an identifier used to declare an enum constant in this class. (Extraneous whitespace characters are not permitted.)
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the enum constant to be returned.
      Returns:
      the enum constant with the specified name
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if this enum class has no constant with the specified name
      NullPointerException - if the argument is null
